metadata.description: Professional legal assistance: anti-corruption, administrative, medical, civil and criminal law, mediation, declaration support.

hero.title: Reliable protection in the most complex cases
hero.subtitle: Asset declarations, anti-corruption proceedings, and support for public officials.
hero.quote: The law works when someone who knows how to use it is by your side. That is my job.

approach.title: My approach
approach.text: I handle every case personally - from the first consultation to the result.

position.title: My position
position.text: Protection built on the law and your interest, not on influence.

practicesPreview.title: Practice areas
practicesPreview.subtitle: Specialised areas where I handle cases personally and to the result.

electronic-declarations.name: Electronic declarations
electronic-declarations.question: Facing an NACP audit?
electronic-declarations.description: Full support at every stage: completing declarations, responding to NACP requests, and defence during full audits.

civil-servants-support.name: Support for public officials
civil-servants-support.question: Under pressure in public service?
civil-servants-support.tagline: Protect your rights and your position.
civil-servants-support.description: Legal support for officials in service disputes, disciplinary and anti-corruption proceedings.

criminal-law.name: Economic crimes (white-collar)
criminal-law.question: Accused of an economic crime?
criminal-law.tagline: We will build your line of defence.
criminal-law.description: Defence in service and business crime cases — from the pre-trial investigation to court.

aboutPreview.title: Regina Guseinova: attorney, mediator, lecturer
aboutPreview.lead: An attorney focused on electronic declarations, anti-corruption law, and support for public officials. I handle cases personally — from the first consultation to the result.
aboutPreview.secondary: A certified mediator, I regularly lecture for judges and officials. I combine deep knowledge of the law with practical experience in the most complex cases.
credentials: Attorney, member of the National Bar Association
Lecturer for judges and public officials
Member of the National Association of Mediators of Ukraine

quote.text: The law works when someone who knows how to use it is by your side. That is my job.
quote.author: Regina Guseinova

lectures.judges-school: National School of Judges of Ukraine — declaration workshop
lectures.odesa-council: Odesa Regional Council — anti-corruption law seminar
lectures.ministry-justice: Ministry of Justice of Ukraine — webinar for lawyers
lectures.national-academy: National Academy of Public Administration — lecture series

media.title: Media commentary
media.subtitle: Commentary and appearances in the media.

videos.forum: Talk at the public officials forum

nazk-checklist.title: How to prepare for an NACP audit: a step-by-step checklist
nazk-checklist.excerpt: An NACP audit is a serious test even for experienced public officials. We break down what they check and how to prepare in advance.

proceedings-opened.title: What to do if proceedings are opened against you
proceedings-opened.excerpt: The first steps after receiving a summons or a notice of suspicion — from choosing a defender to your conduct during questioning.

declaration-mistakes.title: Common mistakes in electronic declarations
declaration-mistakes.excerpt: An analysis of the most common mistakes that lead to violations and fines. How to avoid them and what to do if one has already been made.

practices.title: Practices
practices.subtitle: Areas in which I provide legal assistance
practices.lead: Eight specialised areas — from anti-corruption defence to corporate disputes. Each one means deep expertise and hands-on experience.

cta.title: Not sure which area is yours?
cta.text: Book a consultation — we'll help you find the practice that fits your situation.

electronic-declarations.title: Electronic declarations & full audit support
electronic-declarations.short: Support throughout filing electronic declarations, compliance review and defence when violations are found.

anti-corruption.title: Anti-corruption law
anti-corruption.short: Advice on anti-corruption law, representation before NABU and SAPO, and defence at the pre-trial investigation stage.

administrative-law.title: Administrative law
administrative-law.short: Challenging unlawful actions of authorities and protecting your rights in dealings with state and local government bodies.

mediation.title: Mediation
mediation.short: Out-of-court dispute resolution: negotiation, finding common ground and concluding mediation agreements without litigation.

medical-law.title: Medical law
medical-law.short: Protecting the rights of patients and medical staff, disputes with healthcare institutions and medical malpractice matters.

civil-servants-support.title: Legal support for civil servants
civil-servants-support.short: Legal protection for civil servants: disciplinary proceedings, appealing decisions and reinstatement to office.

civil-law.title: Civil law
civil-law.short: Representation in civil cases: contractual disputes, recovery of damages and inheritance matters.

criminal-law.title: Criminal law
criminal-law.short: Comprehensive defence in criminal proceedings — from the first interrogation to appealing the verdict.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Latest news and updates
news.lead: Current events, commentary and practice updates. Follow key news and legal positions in high-profile cases.

footer.tagline: Reliable legal protection in complex cases. Experience proven by results.
